public_reputation: Duel-court terror whose fury is treated as both spectacle and civic warning.
appearance: Heat-scarred protection, ash-set layers, and house-marked gear read as survival equipment first and status second.
manner: Projects readiness without theatricality, as if discipline matters more than spectacle. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a berserker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of berserker in and around Cindermount, Psanan, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cindermount, Psanan workable through the obligations of berserker while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must prepare for violence without letting the surrounding institution look openly unstable. Around Cindermount, Psanan, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of berserker visibly slip.

Vessa Cindermaw can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Cindermount, Psanan.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
